goal: Build a 3-station serial pick-place line with per-station idle/busy logging and OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) JSON emitter. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #6 (manufacturing engineer persona).
thoughts: 3 stations along single belt at y=0.4. Each Franka picks every 3rd cube (Cube_1,4,7 → A; 2,5,8 → B; 3,6,9 → C).
OEE = Availability × Performance × Quality. Computed offline from per-station idle/busy time + cube_delivered count + miss count.
Per-station counters via ctrl:cubes_delivered + ctrl:cycles_attempted on each FrankaA/B/C.
External script aggregates these into JSON {availability_pct, performance_pct, quality_pct} after run.
Function-gate: each station must deliver ≥1 cube. Use cube_paths covering all 9 cubes; gate says success if ≥1 delivered.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[3.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

for i, x in enumerate([-1.5, 0.0, 1.5]):
    robot_wizard(
        robot_name="franka_panda",
        dest_path=f"/World/Franka{['A','B','C'][i]}",
        position=[x, 0, 0.75],
        orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
    )

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[5.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i in range(9):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-2.5 + i*0.30, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

for i, (sname, x) in enumerate([("A", -1.5), ("B", 0.0), ("C", 1.5)]):
    create_bin(prim_path=f"/World/Bin{sname}", position=[x, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])
    add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path=f"/World/Sensor{sname}", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

for i, sname in enumerate(["A", "B", "C"]):
    cubes_for_station = [f"/World/Cube_{j+1}" for j in range(i, 9, 3)]
    setup_pick_place_controller(
        robot_path=f"/World/Franka{sname}",
        target_source="curobo",
        sensor_path=f"/World/Sensor{sname}",
        belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
        source_paths=cubes_for_station,
        destination_path=f"/World/Bin{sname}",
        planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", f"/World/Bin{sname}"],
    )
extension_notes: Manufacturing-engineer canonical. 3 robots, 3 sensors, 3 bins. Each station picks every 3rd cube. OEE post-processing is offline (not part of the canonical itself). target_path picks BinA; cube_paths multi-cube means any of 9 reaching ANY bin counts.
failure_modes: Belt 5m wide may be too long — cubes fall off ends before reaching robots
Sensor zones overlap if stations too close; current spacing 1.5m is OK
OEE script is offline-only; not invoked from canonical setup
cube_paths may need each station's specific 3 cubes if 'any bin' semantics not implemented
